facilities.name: Los Reales Sustainability Campus Landfill
facilities.address: 5300 E Los Reales Rd, Tucson, AZ 85756
facilities.hours: The City of Tucson lists Los Reales as open Monday through Saturday, 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Confirm holiday hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill charges vary by load type and weight. Check the current Los Reales fee schedule before you drive.
facilities.rules: Secure your load, follow campus traffic instructions, and confirm current rates and accepted materials before arrival.

facilities.name: Los Reales Sustainability Campus Recycling Drop-Off
facilities.address: 5300 E Los Reales Rd, Tucson, AZ 85756
facilities.hours: Use the city campus page to confirm current public recycling drop-off hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Many recycling drop-off services are low-cost or resident-focused, but rules vary by material. Confirm current requirements before arrival.
facilities.rules: Separate materials before you arrive and review the city's latest campus instructions before using the drop-off area.

facilities.name: Los Reales Household Hazardous Waste and E-Waste Drop-Off
facilities.address: 5300 E Los Reales Rd, Tucson, AZ 85756
facilities.hours: The city directs Tucson residents to use Los Reales for household hazardous waste and e-waste. Confirm the current HHW schedule before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste service is resident-focused. Confirm current eligibility, accepted items, and quantity limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside the city HHW program
facilities.rules: Use Tucson's HHW guidance to confirm accepted items, proof-of-residency requirements, and material-preparation rules before you drive.
